features.title: Verify generated harness structure
features.behavior: A fresh generated harness can run structural smoke checks without hidden manual steps.

features.title: Install wrapped source repository
features.behavior: The wrapped source repository exists under src/{{ cookiecutter.source_repo_name }} and has a configured smoke command.

features.title: Define research protocol
features.behavior: The project defines a falsifiable research question, data protocol, metrics protocol, and baseline/comparison protocol.

features.title: Validate AutoResearchClaw managed backend scaffold
features.behavior: The harness includes ARC config, scripts, role briefs, and static checks without requiring ARC to be installed.

features.title: Bootstrap and diagnose AutoResearchClaw runtime
features.behavior: AutoResearchClaw is cloned at the pinned ref, installed in a dedicated runtime, and diagnosed before real research runs.

features.title: Import a managed AutoResearchClaw run
features.behavior: A completed ARC run is imported into harness run records, result manifests, paper artifacts, and checksums.

features.title: Verify strict paper acceptance gate
features.behavior: A final ARC paper can pass only when real experiment metrics, imported run records, and citation verification are present.

features.title: Verify ARC citation evidence
features.behavior: The ARC citation report is present, parseable, and records a passing citation verification result.

features.title: Verify final handoff after managed auto research
features.behavior: The harness handoff files record latest evidence, risks, and next actions after ARC-managed work.

features.title: Validate remote WSL ARC runner
features.behavior: The configured WSL runner exposes Git, Python, Node/npm, Codex auth, GPU visibility, and enough disk for ARC execution.
